name: Salmon Steaks with Cucumber Dill Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place salmon steaks in a microwave-safe dish with the thick end towards the outside.
2. Add remaining ingredients on top of the steaks.
3. Cover and nuke on high for 4-6 minutes.
4. Serve with cucumber-dill sauce.
- For cucumber-dill sauce: Combine all ingredients in a food processor.
- Process until blended.
- Pour into serving bowl; refrigerate 1-2 hours before serving.
